news.summary: Exzeo, a company specializing in insurance technology, has reported a first-quarter diluted EPS of $5.35 and a pre-tax income of $100.3 million. The company is now prepared to operate as a standalone entity.
news.headline: HCI Group Q1 2025: Diluted EPS $5.35, Pre-Tax Income $100.3M, Exzeo set to operate as standalone entity.

news.summary: Last month, the unemployment rate in the United States rose to 6.1%, with 266,000 jobs added to the economy. This increase was higher than expected, as economists had forecasted a gain of 1 million jobs. The leisure and hospitality sector showed the strongest growth, adding 331,000 jobs, while other industries like manufacturing and construction also saw gains. Despite the overall increase in jobs, the unemployment rate rose by 0.1% due to more people rejoining the labor force. The labor force participation rate also experienced a slight increase to 61.7%. This data indicates a continuing recovery in the labor market, although challenges remain in achieving pre-pandemic employment levels. Additionally, the average hourly earnings rose by 0.7%, indicating potential wage pressure as the job market tightens. Overall, the latest employment report reflects a positive trend in job creation, yet the economic recovery from the pandemic remains uneven across industries.
news.headline: Healthcare staffing company, AMN, unveils strong Q1 2025 earnings.
Tejon Ranch Co. reports 2025 Q1 financial results.

news.summary: On May 8, 2025, Rackspace Technology, Inc. shared its first-quarter earnings for the period ending on March 31, 2025. The company, listed on Nasdaq as RXT, specializes in providing comprehensive hybrid cloud and AI solutions. This announcement was made from San Antonio.
news.headline: Rackspace Technology (Nasdaq: RXT) reports first quarter 2025 results, ended March 31.

news.summary: In the third quarter of fiscal 2025, Farmer Brothers Coffee Co. announced its financial performance. The company revealed net sales reaching $82.1 million with gross margins standing at 42.1%.
news.headline: Farmer Brothers Coffee Co. announces Q3 fiscal 2025 results: $82.1M in net sales, 42.1% gross margins.

news.summary: In Athens, Greece, on May 8, 2025, Okeanis Eco Tankers Corp. revealed its decision to exercise its rights to repurchase three VLCC vessels. The Company, listed on NYSE as ECO and OSE as OET, has officially opted to buy back the ships Nissos Kea, Nissos Nikouria, and Nissos Anafi from its existing sale and leaseback provider.
news.headline: Okeanis Eco Tankers Corp declares option to buy back VLCC vessels Nissos Kea, Nissos Nikouria, and Nissos Anafi from current financier.

news.summary: Jonathan Collins has been appointed as the new Chief Financial Officer, starting on May 12, 2025. He will be taking over from Vickie Judy who will be assuming the role of Chief Accounting Officer. This change in leadership comes as part of a strategic transition within the company. Jonathan will be responsible for overseeing the financial operations of the company, while Vickie will be focusing on accounting responsibilities in her new position. This transition marks a significant change in the financial leadership of the company.
news.headline: America's Car-Mart, Inc. appoints Jonathan Collins as new CFO effective May 12, 2025, replacing Vickie Judy as CAO.

news.summary: Guardant Health, Inc., a prominent precision oncology company listed on Nasdaq under GH, revealed their upcoming participation in important investor conferences. Firstly, they will be attending the BofA Securities 2025 Healthcare Conference in Las Vegas, NV, where they will hold a fireside chat on Wednesday, May 14th at 3:40 p.m. Pacific Time. Subsequently, they are scheduled to participate in the Jefferies Global Healthcare Conference in New York, NY, with a fireside chat set for Wednesday, June 4th at 2:35 p.m. Eastern Time. Lastly, Guardant Health will also be present at the Goldman Sachs 46th Annual Global Healthcare Conference.
news.headline: Guardant Health (Nasdaq: GH) to join investor conferences, including BofA Securities, Jefferies, and Goldman Sachs.

news.summary: In Belmont, California, RingCentral, Inc. reported its financial performance for the first quarter ending March 31, 2025. The company, known for AI-driven business communication solutions, shared that their Q1 results were robust. RingCentral's Annual Recurring Revenue (ARR) crossed the significant milestone of $2.5 billion during this period. Vlad Shmunis, the Founder, Chairman, and CEO of RingCentral, expressed satisfaction with their leading position in UCaaS, the promising start in CCaaS, and the rapid adoption of their AI-powered products. He specifically highlighted the successful launch of AI Receptionist within their offerings.
news.headline: RingCentral reports Q1 2025 results, with Annual Recurring Revenue (ARR) exceeding $2.5 billion. CEO Vlad Shmunis sees UCaaS leadership.

news.summary: Affirm Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ: AFRM) headquartered in San Francisco, has released its financial results for the third quarter of fiscal 2025 ending on March 31, 2025. The company, known for its payment network benefiting both consumers and merchants, provided these results along with a shareholder letter submitted to the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission on Form 8-K. The detailed report is available in the "Events and Presentations" section of Affirm's investor relations website, which can be accessed at https://invest. No specific financial numbers were provided in the rephrased text.
news.headline: Affirm reports Q3 fiscal 2025 results; details in shareholder letter to SEC. Visit investor relations website for more info.

news.summary: WILMINGTON, Mass. - Onto Innovation Inc. (NYSE: ONTO) released its financial results for the first quarter of 2025 with significant figures to highlight. The quarter saw record revenue hitting $267 million, showcasing growth for the seventh consecutive quarter. GAAP gross margin stood at 54% while non-GAAP gross margin was slightly higher at 55%. Operating income on a GAAP basis reached $63 million, with non-GAAP operating income at $76 million. Diluted earnings per share were reported at $1.30 on a GAAP basis, and non-GAAP diluted earnings were not disclosed in the news information.
news.headline: Onto Innovation reports record revenue of $267 million in Q1 2025 with GAAP operating income of $63 million.

news.summary: Snowflake, the AI Data Cloud company, has appointed Bill Scannell to its Board of Directors, effective May 7, 2025. This addition comes as the company aims to empower every enterprise to maximize their data and AI capabilities. Snowflake's CEO, Sridhar Ramaswamy, highlighted the significance of Scannell’s appointment, emphasizing his expertise in global sales. Bill Scannell's successful career makes him a valuable addition to the board as Snowflake strives to enhance its services in this rapidly evolving industry.
news.headline: Bill Scannell joins Snowflake's Board of Directors on May 7, 2025. Exciting move to boost enterprise data and AI.

news.summary: In San Diego, Mitek Systems, Inc. (NASDAQ: MITK) announced its financial results for the second quarter ending March 31, 2025. The company, known for digital identity verification and fraud management, achieved record revenue and profitability during this period. Mitek also raised its adjusted EBITDA margin guidance range for the fiscal 2025 full year ending September 30, 2025. Investors can find more information on Mitek's website at www.miteksystems.com.
news.headline: Mitek achieves record revenue & profit; raises adjusted EBITDA margin for fiscal 2025.

news.summary: Santa Monica, California - ZipRecruiter, a top online employment marketplace, disclosed their financial outcomes for the quarter concluding on March 31, 2025. The organization reported a revenue of $110.1 million for Q1'25, surpassing the midpoint of their projected guidance. More extensive details, financial projections, and executive insights can be accessed through the shareholder letter available on the Investor Relations webpage at investors.ziprecruiter.com. ZipRecruiter is listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol ZIP.
news.headline: ZipRecruiter reports $110.1 million revenue in Q1 2025, surpassing guidance. Shareholder letter available for details.

news.summary: In a recent announcement, Pinterest, Inc. (NYSE: PINS) shared its financial performance for the quarter ending on March 31, 2025. The company reported a revenue of $855 million, marking a 16% growth compared to the previous year. Had it been on a constant currency basis, the revenue would have shown a 17% annual increase. The platform also observed a 10% rise in Global Monthly Active Users ("MAUs"), reaching 570 million. The GAAP net income stood at $9 million with an Adjusted EBITDA of $172 million. Furthermore, the net cash provided by operating activities was $364 million, while the free cash flow amounted to $356 million.
news.headline: Pinterest reports Q1 2025 results: $855M revenue, 16% growth, 570M MAUs, $9M GAAP net income, $172M EBITDA, $364M cash from ops.

news.summary: Diodes Incorporated (Nasdaq: DIOD) based in Plano, Texas, released its financial results for the first quarter ending on March 31, 2025. The report showed that the company generated revenue totaling $332.1 million, marking an increase from $302.0 million in the first quarter of 2024 but a slight decline from the prior quarter's $339.3 million. The GAAP gross profit for this quarter reached $104.7 million, up from $99.6 million recorded in the same period last year, yet lower than the previous quarter's $110.9 million. The GAAP gross profit margin was reported at 31.5 percent, showing a decrease compared to the 33.0 percent margin.
news.headline: Diodes Inc. Q1 2025 results: Revenue $332.1M; GAAP gross profit $104.7M; gross profit margin 31.5%.

news.summary: In Jericho, N.Y., FlexFactor, a top provider of real-time payment decline recovery solutions, has revealed a new strategic partnership with Valor PayTech, an omnichannel payment technology provider. The alliance allows merchants and ISOs utilizing Valor PayTech’s payment solutions to effortlessly access FlexFactor’s cutting-edge decline recovery service. This collaboration addresses a costly issue for the industry - payment declines. In the U.S., declined transactions are a significant financial burden for merchants.
news.headline: FlexFactor and Valor PayTech partner to enhance revenue for merchants by reducing payment declines; US merchants face high costs.

news.summary: CAMAS, Washington--nLIGHT, Inc. (Nasdaq: LASR), a top supplier of high-power lasers for vital directed energy, optical sensing, and advanced manufacturing applications, announced its financial performance for Q1 2025. The company expressed satisfaction with a robust beginning to the year, noting total revenue reaching $51.7 million, surpassing the upper end of the projected range. The strong performance was attributed to record-breaking outcomes in the aerospace and defense sectors, as stated by Scott Keeney, the President and CEO of nLIGHT.
news.headline: nLIGHT, Inc. reports Q1 2025 results: Revenue at $51.7M, above guidance range. Strong start driven by aerospace/defense markets.

news.summary: Ingram Micro Holding Corporation (NYSE: INGM) based in Irvine, California, has released their financial results for the fiscal first quarter ending on March 29, 2025. The company reported total net sales of around $12.3 billion for this period. On a GAAP basis, their net income amounted to $69.2 million, equivalent to $0.29 per share, while non-GAAP net income stood at $144.2 million, or $0.61 per share. This represented an 11% increase in net sales compared to the previous year. Ingram Micro expressed satisfaction with their performance during the first quarter.
news.headline: Ingram Micro reports Q1 2025 net sales of $12.3B, GAAP net income of $69.2M, non-GAAP net income of $144.2M.

news.summary: Boston-based hospitality digital platform, Toast, has disclosed an agreement with leading golf entertainment company Topgolf to introduce Toast Enterprise Solutions in Topgolf venues across the United States. The partnership will involve the integration of various Toast products including point-of-sale terminals and payment systems, Kitchen Display Systems (KDS), handheld devices known as Toast Go®, and Multi-Location Management tools. Topgolf is recognized for its casual, beginner-friendly golf experience, and its venues are set to benefit from these digital enhancements.
news.headline: Toast and Topgolf partner for tech overhaul in US; will use POS terminals, KDS, and handhelds at venues.

news.summary: Custom Truck One Source, Inc. (NYSE: CTOS) unveiled the launch of a new establishment in Portland, Oregon, effective June 1, 2025. This move aims to improve services for clients in the Portland area and the wider Pacific Northwest region. The facility will cater to various infrastructure sectors, including electric utility, telecom, rail, forestry, and waste management. This strategic expansion aligns with Custom Truck's commitment to enhancing customer experience and market presence.
news.headline: Custom Truck One Source opens new Portland location on June 1, 2025, to meet growing demand in the Pacific Northwest.

news.summary: In the first quarter of 2025, Illumina reported core revenue amounting to $1.04 billion, which showed a 1% decrease from the same period in 2024, remaining unchanged when adjusted for constant currency fluctuations. The company achieved a GAAP operating margin of 15.8% and a non-GAAP operating margin of 20.4% during Q1 2025. Earnings per share were recorded at $0.82 on a GAAP basis and $0.97 on a non-GAAP basis for the same quarter. Additionally, cash provided by operations was...
news.headline: Illumina's Q1 2025 revenue: $1.04B (down 1% from Q1 2024). Operating margin: 15.8% GAAP, 20.4% non-GAAP. EPS: $0.82 GAAP, $0.97 non-GAAP.

news.summary: In Calgary, AB, on May 8, 2025, Vermilion Energy Inc. shared the outcomes of their recent annual shareholder meeting held on May 7, 2025. The meeting saw a significant turnout, with 77,221,704 common shares, equivalent to 50.03% of Vermilion's total issued shares, being represented. The company expressed satisfaction with the voting results.

news.summary: Utilizing EY's extensive expertise, a company is incorporating deep domain knowledge and skills to enhance essential operations throughout the organization. The company will implement an EY managed service solution integrated with artificial intelligence capabilities and cutting-edge cloud technology from SAP. This integrated approach aims to revolutionize data management and facilitate a more advanced and efficient system.
news.headline: EY and SAP collaborate to launch new solution - EY managed service with AI for enterprise operations with SAP S/4HANA® Cloud.

news.summary: The likelihood of a recession in 2025 remains minimal, though the U.S. economy is on track for significant challenges ahead. A potential consequence of a depreciating dollar is a substantial increase in interest rates. As of May 8, 2025, the second Trump administration's initial 100 days have resulted in notable developments.
news.headline: Beacon Economics forecasts low chance of recession in 2025, but warns of a possible interest rate hike if the dollar depreciates.

news.summary: On May 8, 2025, Nektar Therapeutics (Nasdaq: NKTR) released their financial data for the first quarter ending March 31, 2025. They disclosed having $220.7 million in cash and marketable securities on March 31, 2025, marking a decrease from $269.1 million on December 31, 2024.
news.headline: Nektar Therapeutics Q1 2025: Cash $220.7M (Dec 2024: $269.1M). Financial report released.

news.summary: On May 8, 2025, Gap Inc. (NYSE: GAP) announced that it will disclose its financial results for the first quarter of fiscal year 2025 through a press release on May 29, 2025, at around 1:15 p.m. PT. The company will also conduct a conference call to discuss its performance during this period.
news.headline: Gap Inc. (NYSE: GAP) will announce Q1 fiscal 2025 results on May 29, 2025, at 1:15 p.m. PT.

The latest development includes an intelligent donation form that enhances user experience. The introduction of these new features has led to a notable surge in conversion rates by X% and a substantial increase in fundraising volume, reaching a total of $Y.

news.summary: In Milpitas, California, on May 8, 2025, the KLA Corporation (NASDAQ: KLAC) announced a quarterly cash dividend of $1.90 per share on its common stock. The dividend is set to be payable on June 3, 2025, to shareholders of record as of May 19, 2025.
news.headline: KLA Corp announces $1.90 per share quarterly dividend to be paid on June 3, 2025 with record date of May 19, 2025.

news.summary: Today, MGM Resorts International (NYSE: MGM) revealed a new employment deal with CEO & President Bill Hornbuckle in Las Vegas. The agreement extends his tenure through December 31, 2028. The contract outlines various terms for his continued leadership within the company.
news.headline: MGM Resorts signs new employment agreement with CEO & President Bill Hornbuckle until Dec 31, 2028. Characters: 88

news.summary: Research Solutions, Inc. (NASDAQ: RSSS) reported a 23% increase in Annual Recurring Revenue (ARR) to $20.4 million, with net B2B ARR growth of $736,000 in the fiscal third quarter ending March 31, 2025. The total revenue for the quarter was $12.7 million, up 4.5% from the previous year, with platform revenue accounting for 38% of total revenue. The company achieved a net income of $216,000 and recorded a record Adjusted EBITDA of $1.4 million. Cash flow from operations was approximately $2.9 million in the quarter. The company's Gross profit was up 14% with a total gross margin of 49.5%. The platform revenue increased by 22% to $4.8 million. The total gross margin improved by 430 basis points. The company reported strong organic growth in ARR sales and continues to generate positive operating cash flow. Overall, Research Solutions experienced significant growth and milestone achievements, attributed to revamped sales strategy and product efficiency. The company's financial and operational results show positive growth trajectory and strong performance.
news.headline: Research Solutions Reports Q3 2025 Results: $12.7M revenue, 23% $20.4M ARR, 43 new deployments, $1.4M adjusted EBITDA. CEO highlights strong growth.

news.summary: AEye, Inc., a top player in cutting-edge lidar technology, has disclosed its performance details for the first quarter concluded on March 31, 2025. Noteworthy recent achievements include the initiation of operations for the Apollo manufacturing line at LITEON, preparing for B-sample deliveries to automotive OEMs in the upcoming second quarter of 2025. Furthermore, the company has successfully reached the concluding test phase for Apollo’s integration into NVIDIA’s DRIVE platform. This development is anticipated to lay the groundwork for extensive utilization of Apollo in Advanced Driver Assistance Systems (ADAS) in the near future.
news.headline: AEye (Nasdaq: LIDR) reports Q1 2025 results; Apollo manufacturing line at LITEON operational; final test with NVIDIA's DRIVE.

news.summary: Whitehawk Therapeutics, Inc. reported financial results for the first quarter of 2025, including a significant increase in cash, cash equivalents, and short-term investments to $231.1 million compared to $47.2 million in December 2024. The company recorded total revenue of $7.1 million with net income of $73.0 million due to the sale of Aadi Subsidiary, Inc. The company is on track to bring three assets to investigational new drug (IND) status by mid-2026, with the first IND planned for Q4 2025. Whitehawk focuses on ADC cancer treatments and completed strategic transactions, including a $100 million PIPE financing. These assets target PTK7, MUC16, and SEZ6 and are developed to minimize off-target toxicity. The company's ADC portfolio is in-licensed from WuXi Biologics. For more details, visit www.whitehawktx.com.
news.headline: Whitehawk Therapeutics reports $231.1M cash on Mar 31, 2025, $7.1M revenue, $73.0M net income due to $87.4M gain from asset sale.

news.summary: In San Francisco, Ouster, Inc. (Nasdaq: OUST), a prominent player in lidar sensors and software solutions across various sectors, reported its financial performance for the first quarter of 2025. The company disclosed revenue of $33 million, marking a 26% increase from the previous year and an 8% rise sequentially. Moreover, Ouster shipped about 4,700 sensors during this period to generate revenue.
news.headline: Ouster reports strong Q1 2025 results: $33M revenue (up 26% YoY), shipped 4,700 sensors.

news.summary: Co-operators General Insurance Company reported their quarterly earnings for the three months ending March 31, 2025. The consolidated net income was $72.9 million, a decrease from $93.8 million in the same period in 2024. Earnings per common share were $2.64 for the quarter, down from $3.41 in the previous year. The company cited market and geopolitical uncertainty as challenges, along with increased weather events impacting underwriting. Despite this, they maintained a focus on providing financial security for Canadians. Key financial figures for the quarter included $1,251.3 million in direct written premium, $1,296.7 million in net insurance revenue, and total assets of $8,706.4 million. Rob Wesseling, the President and CEO, highlighted their resilience in navigating volatility and continuing to support customers during challenging times. Full details are available on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Co-Operators General Insurance Company reported Q1 2025 net income at $72.9M, down from $93.8M in Q1 2024. Earnings per share $2.64 vs. $3.41 previous year.

news.summary: In Las Vegas, MP Materials Corp. (NYSE: MP) revealed its financial and operational performance for the first quarter of 2025. The company reported record NdPr oxide production and initial sales of magnetic precursor materials. James Litinsky, the Founder, Chairman, and CEO of MP Materials, highlighted the strong execution in both the Materials and Magnetics divisions. The recent quarter showed significant progress, showcasing the company's growth and success.
news.headline: MP Materials Corp reported Q1 2025 results, with record NdPr oxide production and initial sales of magnetic precursor materials.

news.summary: Mexican stocks have surged ahead of their U.S. counterparts this year, showcasing their most significant outperformance against the S&P 500 since 2005. By May 8, the iShares MSCI Mexico ETF (NYSE: EWW) rose by 26%, while the S&P 500, tracked by the SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust (NYSE: SPY), declined by 4.5%. This marks a substantial 30.5 percentage point lead in just under five months, rivaling the 37% annual outperformance in 2005 but at a notably quicker pace. The Mexican peso has also seen a 6.5% appreciation against the U.S. dollar, supporting the stock rally.
news.headline: Mexican stocks outperforming U.S. by 30.5% in 2025, with EWW ETF up 26% and SPY down 4.5%. Peso strengthens against dollar.

news.summary: Natural Grocers by Vitamin Cottage, Inc. (NYSE: NGVC) has reported their second-quarter fiscal 2025 results ending on March 31, 2025, forecasting an optimistic outlook for fiscal 2025. The exact numerical figures for the earnings, revenue, and other key metrics are outlined in the full report, demonstrating growth and potential for the rest of the fiscal year. This update was provided on May 8, 2025, suggesting a promising future for Natural Grocers by Vitamin Cottage, Inc.

(NYSE: EVH) revealed its focus on improving health outcomes for individuals with complex conditions by offering effective solutions that streamline healthcare and lower costs. The company aims to provide better healthcare accessibility and affordability.
news.headline: Evolent Health, Inc. reports Q1 2025 results, specializing in better health outcomes for complex conditions.

news.summary: In Jericho, New York, 1-800-FLOWERS.COM, Inc. (NASDAQ: FLWS) has appointed Adolfo Villagomez as the new Chief Executive Officer, starting May 12, 2025. This change is effective as of May 07, 2025. Adolfo Villagomez will take over from Jim McCann, who will continue in his role as Executive Chairman and play an active part in the company. 1-800-FLOWERS.COM, Inc. is known for providing meaningful gifts to foster stronger connections, with a mission to encourage more giving and building of relationships.
news.headline: Adolfo Villagomez named CEO of 1-800-FLOWERS.COM, Inc. Effective May 12, 2025. Jim McCann to remain Executive Chairman.

news.summary: In Lakewood, Colorado on May 8, 2025, Natural Grocers by Vitamin Cottage, Inc. revealed a quarterly cash dividend of $0.12 per common share. This announcement was made by the company's Board of Directors and the dividend is set to be dispersed on June 11, 2025 to all stockholders of the company trading under the symbol NYSE: NGVC.
news.headline: Natural Grocers declared $0.12 quarterly dividend per common share; to be paid on June 11, 2025 to all stockholders.

news.summary: In Jericho, New York, 1-800-FLOWERS.COM, Inc. (NASDAQ: FLWS) announced its Fiscal 2025 third-quarter results ending on March 30, 2025. The company, renowned for providing meaningful expressions that encourage customers to foster connections and relationships, expressed disappointment in the quarterly performance. Jim McCann, the Executive Chairman and current Chief Executi, emphasized the commitment to reversing this underperformance.
news.headline: 1-800-FLOWERS.COM, Inc. reports Q3 Fiscal 2025 results; emphasizes commitment to improving performance.

news.summary: In San Francisco, Yelp Inc. (NYSE: YELP) shared financial data for the first quarter ending March 31, 2025. The company highlights its services business's robust performance and advancements in product development. Jeremy Stoppelman, Yelp's co-founder and CEO, expressed satisfaction with the quarter's results. Interested parties can access the Q1 2025 Shareholder Letter on the Investor Relations website at yelp-ir.com.
news.headline: Yelp reported strong Q1 2025 results - revenue from product innovation and services growth, CEO mentioned progress on product roadmap.

news.summary: In Malvern, Pennsylvania, Cantaloupe, Inc. (Nasdaq: CTLP), a prominent global provider of self-service commerce technology solutions, released its third-quarter results for the period ending March 31, 2025. The Company's CEO, Ravi Venkatesan, expressed satisfaction with the quarter, noting significant adoption of smart stores, robust earnings growth, and positive cash flow generation. This success highlights Cantaloupe's position as a leader in the industry.
news.headline: Cantaloupe, Inc. (Nasdaq: CTLP) announces Q3 fiscal year 2025 results. Strong earnings growth and adoption of smart stores.CEO optimistic about operating success.
